zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏强震荡上行
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1756.45，价格运行于20周期均线1740.62上方，显示短期多头仍占据主动。24小时涨幅虽仅0.14%，但价格持续维持高位整理，表明市场抛压有限，整体结构呈现震荡偏强特征。

从技术指标看，MACD数值为8.74543且维持正值区间，反映多头动能仍然存在。不过由于信号线及RSI数据缺失，暂时无法确认趋势强度是否进一步扩张。结合均线位置分析，中短期趋势仍偏向上行，但需警惕高位震荡后的获利回吐。

关键支撑位首先关注1740美元附近的20日均线区域，其次为1730美元一线。上方阻力位集中在1760至1775美元区间，若有效突破并站稳1760美元上方，则有望打开进一步上涨空间，挑战更高目标区域。

交易策略方面，短线投资者可关注回踩1740至1745美元区域后的企稳机会，以顺势做多思路为主。若价格跌破1740美元且成交量放大，应及时控制风险。激进交易者可等待突破1760美元后跟进，多头目标可看向1775至1800美元区间。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar is showing a tight consolidation around 1756, with a very narrow 24-hour range indicating reduced volatility. Price action remains slightly biased to the upside, holding just above the SMA(20) at 1740.62. The market structure suggests accumulation after a minor recovery phase, with buyers maintaining control near intraday highs, though momentum is not yet strong enough to confirm a breakout developing.

Indicators show mixed but mildly bullish signals, with MACD reading at 8.745 indicating positive momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of a full crossover. RSI is not available, but price stability above short-term averages suggests neutral-to-positive conditions. The SMA(20) continues to act as dynamic support, reinforcing the idea that dips are being absorbed by buyers here currently.

Support and resistance levels are tightening as Ethereum trades near the upper boundary of its recent range. Immediate support is located at the SMA(20) around 1740, followed by deeper support at 1720 and psychological 1700. On the upside, resistance is forming near 1760, with a breakout potentially targeting 1785 and then the 1800 psychological level if bullish momentum expands further zone.

Traders should consider range-bound strategies while volatility remains compressed, favoring buy-the-dip entries near 1740 support with tight risk control. A confirmed break above 1760 would signal continuation potential toward higher targets, while rejection may trigger short-term pullbacks. Stop-loss levels below 1720 are prudent for long positions, and position sizing should remain conservative until a clear MACD signal alignment or volatility expansion occurs carefully.
